text:
There lived a lonely badger who loved shiny things. One night, under a star-spangled sky, she collected everything shiny she could find: a piece of old brocade, a worn-out brooch, a solitary shard of moonstone...

But then she buried them deep in her burrow.

Every night she'd visit them. She sang little songs.

One night an owl heard her.

The owl flew over. Owleted.

The badger ran back to her shiny treasures. That night an owl dropped an old feather.

That night... a storm. The next day...

All things shiny were gone. Buried.

The badger knew.

She dug up her treasures.

They were dirty.

She cleaned them.

They sparkled.

She wore them.

Everyone loved them.

And so our dear badger lived happily ever after... with all sorts of shiny things.<|endoftext|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|>
